title: Bibby AI: An Editor-Native Agentic Platform for Academic Research, Writing, and Publishing
innovation_summary: Bibby AI: An Editor-Native Agentic Platform for Academic Research, Writing, and Publishing: We present Bibby AI, an editor-native platform that collapses this toolchain into a single Research-Write-Publish pipeline built around a cloud LaTeX editor.
